programs.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programs.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programs.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programs.desc: The teams’ trust, and team work is tested as they go in blind into a face off challenge. Then who will be one step closer to victory in the all-important treasure hunt.

programs.title: Tipping Point Australia
programs.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Principal Skinner offers Lisa a chance to tutor Cletus' kids; Bart tries to scare his peers out of the cafeteria by claiming it’s haunted.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon and Penny are thrown for a loop when Leonard is offered an exciting new job opportunity overseas.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond in Leonard's absence, but it's Sheldon's feelings that are crushed when Leonard returns from the North Sea.
